task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "解析输入的URL，验证其格式是否正确"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "设置模拟浏览器的请求头"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "发起HTTP GET请求，包含超时和重定向设置"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "检查HTTP响应的状态码是否为200"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "处理404错误，返回链接不存在的结果"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "捕获超时异常，返回连接超时的结果"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "捕获重定向过多异常，返回重定向次数过多的结果"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "捕获SSL证书验证失败异常，返回SSL问题的结果"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "捕获其他请求异常，返回详细的错误信息"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "解析HTML文档，定位微信文章内容区域"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "提取主标题（兼容新旧版微信排版）"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "遍历内容区域，识别小标题"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "提取正文段落并进行智能分段"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "提取文章中的图片链接"}, {"id": "Node15", "description": "将解析结果保存为Markdown文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "validateFormat"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "setHeaders"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "getResponse"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "checkStatusCode"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node6", "type": "handleTimeout"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node7", "type": "handleRedirects"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node8", "type": "handleSSL"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node9", "type": "handleOtherErrors"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node10", "type": "parseHTML"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "extractMainTitle"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node12", "type": "extractSubTitles"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node13", "type": "extractParagraphs"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node14", "type": "extractImages"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node15", "type": "saveAsMarkdown"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node15", "type": "saveAsMarkdown"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node15", "type": "saveAsMarkdown"}, {"source": "Node14", "target": "Node15", "type": "saveAsMarkdown"}]}
